.file-embed.background: rgb(168, 152, 205) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(153, 135, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(182, 169, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 35%, 75%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(258, 35%, 75%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 35%, 75%) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 35%, 75%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(258, 35%, 75%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 35%, 75%) 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(182, 169, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(182, 169, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(110, 83, 172, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(182, 169, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(110, 83, 172, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(153, 135, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(153, 135, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(92, 199, 245, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(182, 169, 214) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(153, 135, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(217, 209, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(168, 152, 205) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(212, 125, 186, 0.6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(168, 152, 205) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
